diagnosis: The level is a 200+ tile wide horizontal corridor with almost no elevation change — spawn and exit sit on the same flat floor, and the few platforms that exist are isolated 2-tile strips at the same height. The player completed 36 seconds with zero deaths, zero falls, and only 5 enemies killed, confirming the level can be beaten by holding one direction. The rating of 2/5 and the comment 'boring level design' match the pattern of a pure walk-simulator.
